system.description:
What it does (SRD): Represents a monster special quality that makes the creature’s blows land more reliably—here modeled as a flat +1 bonus on attack rolls (all melee and ranged attacks that use the general attack bonus).

ThirdEra: On this item’s Details tab, the +1 is entered in Mechanical effects. It stacks with other attack bonuses from feats, equipment, and conditions, and appears in attack breakdowns as Brute blows.
